description: The Async For node is used to perform looping operations by allowing one to fire impulses a set amount of times. It is the async variant of the For node.

fields.Count: The amount of times to trigger ``LoopIteration``. Will not trigger any iterations if less than 1.
fields.Reverse: If ``True``, the ``Iteration`` output will start at ``Count - 1`` and go down towards ``0``.
fields.LoopStart: Fires after ``*`` is pulsed and before any iterations are done. Will be pulsed even if ``Count < 1``.
fields.LoopIteration: Fires for each iteration of the loop. This impulse is triggered ``Count`` amount of times and the next iteration will only be fired once the current iteration's context is finished.
fields.LoopEnd: Fires after the final ``LoopIteration`` completes execution.
fields.Iteration: For each ``LoopIteration``, this output is set to be the index of the iteration for said iteration's context. By default, this will start at ``0`` and increment until ``Count - 1`` unless ``Reverse`` is ``True``.
